document: circular on the regulatory framework on open banking in nigeria (Nigeria - Row 8)

sections.heading: Risk Management……………………………………………….14
sections.summary: Defines customer consent requirements for data sharing in open banking, including explicit consent, annual revalidation, and customer responsibilities.
sections.dtia_summary: Requires explicit customer consent for data sharing, annual revalidation, and clear communication of rights and implications for open banking data transfers.

requirements.text: Agreements presented to customer must be simple, explicit, and in customer's preferred language
Consent must be obtained in the same form as agreement presentation and preserved by participant
Specific rights granted to customer must be listed separately for consent
Customer consent revalidated annually; if 180 days inactive, consent automatically revalidated
Participant and partner jointly liable for customer losses except proven wilful negligence or fraud

sections.source_quote: The customer is critical to the successful implementation of open banking. Therefore, the protection of the customer shall be the responsibility of all participants.
